channel.title: ZenGeekLabs blog
channel.description: Notes on programming, tools, workflows, knowledge management, and methods worth keeping.

item.title: My First Post
item.description: A minimal post used to test the blog layout and basic typography.

item.title: A Bigger Toolbox Is Not the Goal. Methods Are.
item.description: Tools can keep changing. Your methods should slowly become more stable.

item.title: Building a Writing System Matters More Than Finding the Next Tool
item.description: What keeps writing sustainable is not constant tool upgrades, but a stable writing system.

item.title: A Few Hugo Snippets That Are Enough to Keep This Blog Growing
item.description: Keeping reusable Hugo snippets around saves a lot of repeat searching.

item.title: Reading Notes Do Not Need to Be Complete. Leave Searchable Anchors First.
item.description: Searchable anchors are easier to sustain than perfect summaries.

item.title: Format Showcase: TOC, Tables, Code Blocks, and Admonitions in One Post
item.description: Put the common formats into one article so we can quickly verify the TOC, typography, and component styling.
